name: ai-challenge

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web && npm run build --workspace api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web && npm run lint --workspace api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace web && npm run typecheck --workspace api
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api

description: Base de desafio fullstack com Next.js e Express
